crime.value: Murder of Farmer Thatcher in 1965, preceded by theft of his prize sheep
crime.quote: they both killed him. Max's Auntie told him all this days before the show

victim.value: Farmer Thatcher, popular village supplier whose wife was having an affair, making him a target for revenge
victim.quote: his father was in a relationship with Madeline Thatcher

closed_world.value: Small village community where Farmer Thatcher supplied meat and dairy, with known local relationships
closed_world.quote: This field was distant from everywhere else with in the small village

culprit_and_motive.value: Mr Morrison and Mrs Thatcher killed Farmer Thatcher after he beat his wife in anger over her affair
culprit_and_motive.quote: So then they plotted to kill the sheep to get vengeance but Mr Morrison was still so angry

resolution.value: Cold case team in 2011 solved the 1965 murder through witness testimony from Max Morrison
resolution.quote: Max agreed to be a witness. He had told Lennon that his father and his Uncle had gone to the farm

investigator.value: Cold Case Team member Lennon investigating the decades-old murder
investigator.quote: 2011-07-04. Cold Case Team. London. Just when everyone thought disaster, a new lead was brought in

suspect_architecture.value: Three primary suspects with family connections: Mr Morrison (romantic rival with motive), Mrs Thatcher (accomplice with means), Max Morrison (witness/informant), plus secondary figures like Uncle
suspect_architecture.quote: his father was in a relationship with Madeline Thatcher...they both killed him

red_herring.value: The sheep theft as primary crime - deliberately planted to distract from the real motive of adultery and romantic rivalry
red_herring.quote: They were going to fly to Gretna Green to get married

social_world.value: Rural farming community with collective barn-building project, where Farmer Thatcher holds respected position as village supplier
social_world.quote: Farmer Thatcher supplied the village with meat and dairy products...the villagers often helped him

alibi.value: Morrison and Uncle's cover story of airport pickup for elopement breaks down when witness Max reveals the true sequence of events
alibi.quote: His Uncle was to pick her up and drive them both to the airport

reveal_mechanic.value: Witness testimony from Max Morrison after TV show prompts him to reveal family secrets about the murder plot
reveal_mechanic.quote: Max agreed to be a witness. He had told Lennon that his father and his Uncle had gone to the farm

media_and_audience.value: Cold case TV show creates public platform that pressures witness to come forward with crucial testimony
media_and_audience.quote: Max's Auntie told him all this days before the show

_meta.title: ebook megan lewis sheep snatcher thief catcher what 8217 s the good in that old thatcher
